title: Creating new custom boards or board views using the API
excerpt: Is it possible to make a new sharable custom board view via an integration or button click? I had seen the create_board query but that doesn’t seem to do what I’d want. I see you can provide it a template_id, but we can’…

posts.author: driftgod99 (VP)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to make a new sharable custom board view via an integration or button click? I had seen the create_board query but that doesn’t seem to do what I’d want. I see you can provide it a template_id, but we can’t quite make board templates and can only make board views as far as I understand.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @driftgod99 - at this time it wouldn’t be possible to create a view through the API. Could you expand a bit more on what you’re looking to do?

-Daniel

posts.author: driftgod99 (VP)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to make a custom shareable board that should be generated when a user either moves a row from one group to another or creates a button and this will automatically generate the board and share it with a user.
